title: Idea Body Sections
description: Markdown body sections expected in every idea file. Not frontmatter — extracted by ingest, never validated by JSON Schema.

## Description.description: 1–3 sentence explanation of what the idea is. Written as prose, not bullets.

## Problem.description: What gap, pain point, or opportunity this idea addresses. Append bullets; never duplicate.

## Approach.description: How this idea could be explored or implemented. Append bullets as thinking evolves; never duplicate.

## Open Questions.description: Unresolved questions that need answers before this idea can be validated or promoted. Append new questions; remove answered ones.

## Notes.description: Free-form overflow notes, references, or scratchpad content. Append paragraphs; preserve existing text.
